    have h₁ : (Finset.univ.filter fun j => c j = i).card = 4 := h i
    have h₂ : (Finset.univ.filter fun j => c j = i ∧ (j : ℕ) % 2 = 0).card +
        (Finset.univ.filter fun j => c j = i ∧ (j : ℕ) % 2 = 1).card = 4 := by

      apply Eq.symm
      have h₄ : (Finset.univ.filter fun j => c j = i ∧ (j : ℕ) % 2 = 0).card ≤ 2 := by

          _ = 2 * n := by
            simp [Finset.card_filter, Finset.mem_univ]
            apply Nat.div_two_mul_two
            omega
      have h₅ : (Finset.univ.filter fun j => c j = i ∧ (j : ℕ) % 2 = 1).card ≤ 2 := by
        have h₆ : (Finset.univ.filter fun j => c j = i ∧ (j : ℕ) % 2 = 1) ⊆
            Finset.univ.filter fun j => (j : ℕ) % 2 = 1 := Finset.filter_subset _ _
        calc
          (Finset.univ.filter fun j => c j = i ∧ (j : ℕ) % 2 = 1).card ≤
              (Finset.univ.filter fun j => (j : ℕ) % 2 = 1).card := Finset.card_le_card h₆
          _ = 2 * n := by
            simp [Finset.card_filter, Finset.mem_univ]
            apply Nat.div_two_mul_two_add_one
            omega
      omega
    calc
      (Finset.univ.filter fun j => c j = i ∧ (j : ℕ) % 2 = 0).card = 2 := by
        omega
      _ = (Finset.univ.filter fun j => j ∈ Finset.univ.filter fun j => (j : ℕ) % 2 = 0 ∧ c j = i).card := by
        rfl
      _ = (Finset.univ.filter fun j => (j : ℕ) % 2 = 0).filter (fun j => c j = i).card := by
        rfl
      _ = {j ∈ Finset.univ.filter fun j => (j : ℕ) % 2 = 0 | c j = i}.card := by
        rfl
